about.title: About
about.intro: Hi! I'm João Pedro, a Computer Science student at UNIFESP. Welcome to my website. I hope you find useful information here.
about.current_experience_text: I currently work as a fullstack developer intern at G3P, developing web applications using ASP.NET Core, and actively contribute to open-source projects, especially wiRedPanda.
about.outside_code_text: When I'm not coding, I study music, read about philosophy, theology or literature, and try to learn a language (currently German). I also enjoy spending time with my dog, practicing obedience exercises - an activity that teaches me a lot about patience, I might add.
about.lets_talk_text: I'm open to professional opportunities, open-source contributions, and freelance work. If you'd like to discuss an opportunity or simply have a chat, I'd be happy to talk!

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here I showcase projects I'm involved in or write at university, as well as some things I build in my free time.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey
experience.cta_text: Interested in working with me or learning more about my experience?

error.description: Oops! I think the page you're looking for doesn't exist.

chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Zippy, a cybernetic assistant and João's number one fan. You can ask me about his experience, projects, or how to contact him!

meta.description: João Pedro - Computer Science student at UNIFESP, fullstack developer, open-source enthusiast and software craftsmanship.
meta.og_description: Computer Science student, fullstack developer and open-source enthusiast.
